title: Bury Me Deep
description: Brushing sand/gravel allows players to make their own suspicious blocks!
body:
## Overview

This mod allows players to create their own suspicious sand and gravel. This takes a couple steps:
- **Brush the block of choice.** It will eventually open up to accepting items.
- **Deposit blocks on top or close by.** The items must be entities (ex: a hopper would not work.)
  - While it can accept items, brushing it will **reset the time** left until it "sets".
- Et voila, the **suspicious block will form**!

Take a gander at some similar (and mostly Fabric) mods [here](https://modrinth.com/mods?q=suspicious+blocks).

---

**Requires [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint) 7.1.0+.**

Credit for the mod concept goes to Zym (even if there were probably some ways in which our visions diverged here, eheh). And thanks to Jsburg for mixin help!

Please direct any and all suggestions/improvements to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/burymedeep/issues).

P.S. Apparently ctrl+drop items drops the entire stack?? Learned this from Zym during the dev process lol
